description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 5 UI/manual cluster: one-session interactive walkthrough vs permanent E2E suite vs reusable manual case documents vs a11y pass vs evidence policy.

cases.prompt: Drive through every screen of the demo build today and report broken pages with screenshots.
cases.reason: A one-session interactive drive with observations and evidence is a clickthrough — no permanent specs, no reusable case documents requested.

cases.prompt: Write step-by-step manual test cases for onboarding that our contractors can execute every release.
cases.reason: Reusable documents another tester executes are manual test cases; the clickthrough engineer executes sessions, it doesn't author the case library.

cases.prompt: Go through the app keyboard-only and with a screen reader and report accessibility failures.
cases.reason: Keyboard/focus/screen-reader verification is the a11y harness's specialized pass, not a general UI walkthrough.

cases.prompt: Define which screenshots we must capture for release evidence and how to name, mask, and store them.
cases.reason: Evidence policy design is the planner; the clickthrough engineer follows that policy during sessions.
